sourceMovie.title: Thelma & Louise
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Thelma & Louise works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Bonnie and Clyde
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Thelma & Louise clicked for you, Bonnie and Clyde (1967) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and crime, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Badlands
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Thelma & Louise clicked for you, Badlands (1974) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and crime, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Breakdown
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Thelma & Louise clicked for you, Breakdown (1997) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Nothing to Lose
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Thelma & Louise clicked for you, Nothing to Lose (1997) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Thelma & Louise?
faq.answer: Try Bonnie and Clyde, Badlands, Breakdown—each shares DNA with Thelma & Louise while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Thelma & Louise?
faq.answer: Thelma & Louise (1991) is best described as Drama, Crime, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Thelma & Louise worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
